findings.evidence: `rg` shows the new declarations at lines 31 and 43 use only `_root_.FundamentalGroup.map`, `_root_.FundamentalGroup.mapOfEq`, and `[SimplyConnectedSpace A]`; existing related TauCeti files are under `TauCeti/AlgebraicTopology/...`.
findings.fix: Move these declarations to an algebraic-topology home such as `TauCeti/AlgebraicTopology/FundamentalGroup.lean` and update module imports accordingly.
findings.issue: This file contains generic `FundamentalGroup`/`SimplyConnectedSpace` facts but lives in `TauCeti/Topology/Homotopy`; its only dependency is `Mathlib.AlgebraicTopology.FundamentalGroupoid.SimplyConnected`, and the roadmap lists `FundamentalGroup` under `Mathlib/AlgebraicTopology/FundamentalGroupoid/*`.

findings.evidence: `rg -n "map_range_eq_bot_of_simplyConnected|map_range_le_mapOfEq_range_of_simplyConnected" code/TauCeti/Topology/Homotopy/Covering.lean` has no hits, while `Mathlib.Topology.Homotopy.Lifting` publicly imports the fundamental-group and simply-connected modules.
findings.fix: Remove this import, or replace it with the moved algebraic-topology import only if `Covering.lean` actually uses one of those lemmas.
findings.issue: `Covering.lean` imports `TauCeti.Topology.Homotopy.FundamentalGroup` but does not use either new declaration from that file; its remaining fundamental-group and lifting API is already supplied by `Mathlib.Topology.Homotopy.Lifting`.

summary: The new generic fundamental-group API is misplaced under `Topology/Homotopy`, and `Covering.lean` imports it without using it. Move the file into the algebraic-topology hierarchy and drop the unused covering import unless a declaration there actually needs it.
